summary: Tested all email notification features. Backend APIs work correctly. Email sending works for external test addresses but fails for admin notifications to Brendan@shadowwolvesproductions.com.au due to Resend domain verification requirements.

critical.issue: Emails to Brendan@shadowwolvesproductions.com.au fail because shadowwolvesproductions.com.au domain is NOT verified in Resend. Only newsletter.shadowwolvesproductions.com.au is verified.
critical.error_message: The shadowwolvesproductions.com.au domain is not verified. Please, add and verify your domain on https://resend.com/domains
critical.solution: Either: 1) Verify shadowwolvesproductions.com.au domain in Resend, OR 2) Use an email on the verified domain (e.g., admin@newsletter.shadowwolvesproductions.com.au) as ADMIN_EMAIL

minor.issue: Rate limiting can cause notification failures during high traffic
minor.note: Resend allows only 2 requests per second on free tier

action_items: CRITICAL: Verify shadowwolvesproductions.com.au domain in Resend (https://resend.com/domains) to enable admin notifications
ALTERNATIVE: Set ADMIN_EMAIL to an email on the verified domain (e.g., admin@newsletter.shadowwolvesproductions.com.au)
OPTIONAL: Add ADMIN_EMAIL explicitly to backend/.env for clarity
critical_code_review_comments: Email integration code is correctly implemented - issue is Resend domain verification
Background tasks for email sending work correctly
All form submissions (Contact, Investor Inquiry, Work With Us) correctly trigger notification emails
Newsletter bulk email endpoint works correctly
Welcome email on newsletter signup works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test_ prefixed data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All email notification code is correctly implemented. The issue is Resend domain verification - newsletter.shadowwolvesproductions.com.au is verified but shadowwolvesproductions.com.au (where ADMIN_EMAIL lives) is NOT verified. Emails to external test addresses work fine.

email_delivery_analysis.issue: Resend requires recipient domain to be verified when sending from a verified domain to external addresses
emails_that_work: Welcome emails to any external address (test@test.com, etc.)
Bulk newsletter emails to subscribers on any domain
solution_options: 3. Create email forwarding from newsletter subdomain to main domain

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Domain verification mismatch in Resend configuration
rca_of_the_issue.details: The FROM_EMAIL uses newsletter.shadowwolvesproductions.com.au (verified), but ADMIN_EMAIL defaults to Brendan@shadowwolvesproductions.com.au (unverified domain). Resend blocks emails to unverified domains when using a verified sender.
reproduction_steps: 1. Submit any form (Contact, Investor Inquiry, Work With Us)
2. Check backend logs for email notification attempt
3. See error: 'The shadowwolvesproductions.com.au domain is not verified'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Verify the main domain shadowwolvesproductions.com.au in Resend, or change ADMIN_EMAIL to use the verified subdomain
